'''√r-p-l''' ('''rapala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quetch|quetch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quetch|quetch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| rapala
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || rapalithi || rapaliji || rapalishi || rapali
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || rapaluthuth || rapalujuj || rapalushush || rapal
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || rapaluthu || rapaluju || rapalushu || rapalu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || rapalufuth || rapalufuj || rapalufush || rapaluf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || rapalethe || rapaleje || rapaleshe || rapale
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rapalothoth || rapalojoj || rapaloshosh || rapal
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || rapalotho || rapalojo || rapalosho || rapalo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rapalofoth || rapalofoj || rapalofosh || rapalof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rapalïf || rapalïf || rapalïf || rapalïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rapalïfïf || rapalïfïf || rapalïfïf || rapalïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rapalïf || rapalïf || rapalïf || rapalïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rapalïf || rapalïf || rapalïf || rapalïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || rapalæthæ || rapalæjæ || rapalæshæ || rapalæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || rapalathath || rapalajaj || rapalashash || rapal
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || rapalatha || rapalaja || rapalasha || rapala
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || rapalafath || rapalafaj || rapalafash || rapalaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || rapalasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gorapalasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokirapalasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || rapalnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gorapalnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokirapalnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || rapalshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gorapalnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokirapalshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || rapalroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gorapalnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokirapalroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || rapalmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gorapalnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokirapalmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || rapalsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gorapalnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokirapalsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || rapalngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gorapalnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokirapalngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || rapalyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gorapalnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokirapalyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || rapalyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gorapalnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokirapalyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || rapalnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gorapalnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokirapalnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || rapalnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gorapalnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirapalnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || rapalnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gorapalnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokirapalnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || rapalshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gorapalnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokirapalshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || rapalshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gorapalnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirapalshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || rapalshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gorapalnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokirapalshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || rapalronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gorapalnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokirapalronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || rapalroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gorapalnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokirapalroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || rapalromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gorapalnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokirapalromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || rapalmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gorapalnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokirapalmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || rapalmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gorapalnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokirapalmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || rapalmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gorapalnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirapalmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || rapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || ræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || horapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || horæpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohorapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohoræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nürapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünürapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïrapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïrapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lurapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulurapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lirapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || liræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilirapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || liliræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || korapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || koræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokorapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokoræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kerapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || keræpæl
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekerapal
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekeræpæl
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
